creator: mistral@imasy.or.jp
text:
This is a port for xcalendar.
	Xcalendar port was removed on 2000/01/23 by PR 14471, because
	he couldn't find distfiles any more.
	This new port is rely distfile on FreeBSD-jp FTP server and
	has some enhancements:
		- Y2K fix: %y return wrong string.
		- I18N fix: multibyte support for holiday text.
		- Japanese support: holiday list and manual.
		- other bugfix: run time warning derived from wrong X resource

Fix: port skelton is tar.gz.uu'ed because this port includes EUC-JP texts.
